title: [firtool] firrtl DontTouchAnnotation "unapplied annotation with target"
body:
Forgive me if this question has been answered, is documented, or is fairly straightforward, I'm just starting with CIRCT experimentation (I am also a complete LLVM/MLIR n00b). I have a Chisel design in which I'm using `firtool` to generate the Verilog. When I add an annotation file, I begin to get several errors on pretty much all of my annoations (`unapplied annotation with target`). 

```
/home/lsteveol/projects/wlink_test/wav-wlink-hw/wav.wlink.AXI128bit6LaneWlinkTestConfig/WlinkSimpleTestHarness.fir:2:1: error: unapplied annotations with target '~WlinkSimpleTestHarness|WlinkGPIOPHY>scan_out' and payload '[{class = "firrtl.transforms.DontTouchAnnotation"}]'
```
I'm using `firtool` for the Verilog Generation, and also using the `--annotation-file=<>` flag, thinking that would allow me to pass these annotations, but I keep running into these issues. On the Chisel weekly several weeks back, I recall there being some issues with Annotations (primarily `BoringUtils` if my memory serves me correctly). 

Here is what I'm running with `firtool`
```
/home/lsteveol/projects/circt-test/circt/build/bin/./firtool --verilog --lowering-options=exprInEventControl,verifLabels --disable-annotation-unknown \
  --annotation-file=/home/lsteveol/projects/wlink_test/wav-wlink-hw/wav.wlink.AXI128bit6LaneWlinkTestConfig/WlinkSimpleTestHarness.anno.json \
  /home/lsteveol/projects/wlink_test/wav-wlink-hw/wav.wlink.AXI128bit6LaneWlinkTestConfig/WlinkSimpleTestHarness.fir -o myverilog.v
```

Does FIRRTL with Annotations require some sanitation prior to `firtool`? I've been trying to find some docs, but haven't had much luck.
